name: Deviled Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. Cut off one-third of the top from each tomato, reserving for lids.
4. Remove seeds from each tomato.
5. Melt butter in a saucepan and add garlic, bread crumbs, and chopped parsley. Mix well.
6. Remove from heat and add cayenne pepper, paprika, mustard, cheese, and salt. Mix well.
7. Spoon the mixture into tomatoes to form neat mounds. Gently press with fingertips.
8. Place reserved lids on top.
9. Arrange tomatoes, cut sides up, in the greased pan.
10. Bake for 15 minutes.
11. Garnish with parsley sprigs and serve hot.
